name: Shrimp and Feta Alla Grecque
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Feta cheese, drained and coarsely crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shrimp, feta cheese, scallions in a large bowl.
2. Add tomato sauce, olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, basil, dill, salt, and pepper; mix well.
3. Cover and refrigerate 1 hour.
4. Toss shrimp mixture with hot noodles and serve immediately or refrigerate 1 hour and serve cold.
Servings: 6
